issues.detail: The skill provides high-level steps but lacks concrete code or runnable procedures, making it less actionable.

scenarios.name: Audit a Sentry JSON export of 3,200 events from the last 14 days
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lists top errors by count but skips priority labels, percentages, duplicate-group merging, and resolved-but-recurring sections that the rubric requires.

scenarios.name: Flag noisiest alerts and recommend which to silence vs investigate
scenarios.rationale: Baseline conflates severity with volume and misses the keyword-based escalation (payment/auth/password/delete/drop) and dedupe-before-rule-changes guidance the skill enforces.
